spacing_and_layout.general: Generous Spacing Philosophy. p-8 to p-24 for sections.
spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: Bento Grid Protocol (Tetris Mode): grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12, wide gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Aggressive asymmetry.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Control Room Grid Protocol: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4, tight gaps (gap-4 to gap-6). Dense layout.
spacing_and_layout.containers: Max-w-7xl mx-auto for marketing, full-width w/ sidebars for dashboard.

surfaces.cards: Flat solid background (#121212), 1px subtle border (border-white/10). No soft drop shadows. Use sharp inner glow or solid 2px offset shadows on hover.
surfaces.glassmorphism: Used ONLY for sticky headers. backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60, 1px bottom border border-white/10.
surfaces.borders: Expose the skeleton where possible. Technical look.

buttons.primary: bg-[#CCFF00] text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-wide hover:bg-[#D4FF33] transition-colors rounded-none or max rounded-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white hover:border-[#CCFF00] hover:text-[#CCFF00] font-bold uppercase transition-colors

components.inputs: bg-[#121212] border border-white/10 focus:border-[#CCFF00] text-white rounded-none
components.badges: bg-black border border-[#CCFF00]/50 text-[#CCFF00] text-xs px-2 py-1 uppercase tracking-widest
components.tables: Shadcn/UI table, customized with dark rows, hover state bg-white/5, accent border on active row.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling across the site.
motion_and_interactions.hover: Text color shifts, subtle translateY(-2px), borders glow #CCFF00.
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Framer Motion staggered fade-up for bento grid items and course cards.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee. Massive outline text (text-8xl+ font-black text-transparent stroke-white/5) running in background.

hero_background.description: Abstract futuristic 3D neural network glowing in neon green. Dark void. Use with a bg-black/40 overlay to ensure text contrast.

pillars_background.description: Macro photography of abstract glowing neon green energy lines on dark obsidian background.

community_transformation.description: Silhouette of a confident athletic man walking towards a bright neon green glowing light.

course_covers.description: Abstract glowing neon green geometric shapes and dopamine molecule structures.
Minimalist futuristic glowing green grid fading into total black darkness.

athlete_inspiration.description: A man kneeling down on a basketball court in the dark.
A dark hallway with a neon sign for fitness motivation.

pages.Home: Hero with 'Ver cursos' CTA + Neural background. Marquee 'DISCIPLINA • ENFOQUE • ENERGÍA'. Pillars bento grid. Course cards section. Community section with transformation image. Dark massive footer.
pages.Cursos: Grid of course cards, dark theme, sharp edges.
pages.Course_Detail: Immersive hero layout for course details, 'Hotmart' CTA button highlighted in #CCFF00.
pages.Contacto: Clean, minimal form with neon green focus states.
pages.Admin_Login: Technical terminal-like login screen, centered bento card.
pages.Admin_Dashboard: Sidebar navigation. Top-left hero metric. Modular widgets for CRUD courses. Green used ONLY for active/success states.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit'. Use 'Manrope' for body.
All backgrounds must be dark (#0A0A0A or #121212). NEVER use pure white backgrounds.
Use '#CCFF00' as the primary accent color for CTAs, active states, and decorative borders.
Apply 'data-testid' to all buttons, inputs, and interactive elements.
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for marketing page structures instead of Shadcn cards to allow creative overlaps.
Use Shadcn UI for the Admin Dashboard and customize it to match the technical/dark aesthetic.
Hero images MUST have a background overlay (e.g., bg-black/50) to ensure text readability.
Do NOT use placeholder images. ONLY use the provided URLs in the 'media' object.
